acceptance_criteria.criterion: Skill catalog optimization has a deterministic analyzer rather than relying on one-off manual review.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tools/analyze_skill_catalog.py reports catalog health, visibility counts, category counts, issues, and advisory consolidation candidates.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Analyzer behavior is covered for healthy, text-output, missing-entry, and missing-catalog cases.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tests/test_skill_catalog_analyzer.py passed and is included in Makefile test target.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The analyzer contract and operator entrypoint are documented.
acceptance_criteria.proof: README.md, README.zh-CN.md, docs/architecture/API_CONTRACTS.md, and docs/conventions/CONVENTION_MANIFEST.md were updated.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: New helper follows project engineering standards and remains advisory-only.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tasks/2026-04-29-skill-catalog-analyzer/ENGINEERING_STANDARDS_REPORT.md records a passing engineering standards check.

docs_refresh.reason: Added a new repository maintenance CLI contract and README usage entry.
